title: 10 x Narcissus Paper White Bulbs – Christmas Daffodils – Pure White Bunch Flowering - Highly Fragrant Blooms – Perennial – for Your Beautiful Garden- Indoor/Outdoor Plants
features: Suitable for planting in sunny and partially shaded locations Suitable for growing in pots and containers Excellent for cut flowers Fragrant
Winter flowering time Green foliage colour White flowering colour
description: Narcissus Paper White is a delightful and popular choice among gardeners. This bloom is often considered to have the strongest fragrances among all daffodils, and is a true delight to have displayed indoors or outdoors. Although Paper White can be grown outdoors, they're not incredibly hardy, and you might have more joy planting indoors for a winter display. Not only are they unique in fragrance, but their appearance is very different compared to your more traditional daffodils. Each stem hold several small flowers, producing a fuller display! Grows to heights of 35cm. 13/14cm bulbs supplied.
